query-param.param-value: /jspeed/base/query/queryItemList.jsp

insert into jf_query (QUERY_ID, TARGET_DOMAIN, QUERY_TYPE, QUERY_CONTENT1, QUERY_CONTENT2, QUERY_CONTENT3, QUERY_CONTENT4, JDBC_SERVICE, STATEMENT_TYPE, CRE_USER, CRE_DATE, DSC_USER, DSC_DATE) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),?,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'))
delete from jf_query where QUERY_ID=?
DB

select QUERY_ID key, QUERY_ID,TARGET_DOMAIN, QUERY_TYPE, QUERY_CONTENT1 QUERY_CONTENTS, QUERY_CONTENT2, QUERY_CONTENT3, QUERY_CONTENT4, JDBC_SERVICE, STATEMENT_TYPE, CRE_USER, CRE_DATE, DSC_USER, DSC_DATE from jf_query where TARGET_DOMAIN=?

update jf_query set TARGET_DOMAIN=?, QUERY_TYPE=?, QUERY_CONTENT1=?, QUERY_CONTENT2=?, QUERY_CONTENT3=?, QUERY_CONTENT4=?, JDBC_SERVICE=?, STATEMENT_TYPE=?, DSC_USER=?,DSC_DATE=TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') where QUERY_ID=?

select QUERY_ID key, QUERY_ID,TARGET_DOMAIN, QUERY_TYPE, QUERY_CONTENT1 QUERY_CONTENTS, QUERY_CONTENT2, QUERY_CONTENT3, QUERY_CONTENT4, JDBC_SERVICE, STATEMENT_TYPE, CRE_USER, CRE_DATE, DSC_USER, DSC_DATE from jf_query

select /*+ index_desc (x PK_JF_QUERY) */ QUERY_ID key, QUERY_ID,TARGET_DOMAIN, QUERY_TYPE, JDBC_SERVICE, STATEMENT_TYPE, CRE_USER, CRE_DATE, DSC_USER, DSC_DATE from(select /*+ index_desc (x PK_JF_QUERY) */ CEIL(rownum/?) page, QUERY_ID key, QUERY_ID,TARGET_DOMAIN, QUERY_TYPE, JDBC_SERVICE, STATEMENT_TYPE, CRE_USER, CRE_DATE, DSC_USER, DSC_DATE from(select /*+ index_desc (x PK_JF_QUERY) */ QUERY_ID key, QUERY_ID,TARGET_DOMAIN, QUERY_TYPE, JDBC_SERVICE, STATEMENT_TYPE, CRE_USER, CRE_DATE, DSC_USER, DSC_DATE from jf_query x where cre_date<=to_char(sysdate,'yyyymmddhh24miss') and sDomainIDs and cre_user like ?||'%' and query_id like '%'||?||'%' order by query_id asc)) where page=?
jSpeedDataSource
select count(*) from jf_query where sDomainIDs AND CRE_USER like ?||'%' AND QUERY_ID like '%'||?||'%'

select QUERY_ID key, QUERY_ID,TARGET_DOMAIN, QUERY_TYPE, QUERY_CONTENT1 QUERY_CONTENTS, QUERY_CONTENT2, QUERY_CONTENT3, QUERY_CONTENT4, JDBC_SERVICE, STATEMENT_TYPE, CRE_USER, CRE_DATE, DSC_USER, DSC_DATE from jf_query where QUERY_ID=?
select QUERY_ID||'.'||PARAM_ORDER key,QUERY_ID,PARAM_ORDER,COLUMN_TYPE, CRE_USER,CRE_DATE,DSC_USER,DSC_DATE from jf_query_param order by QUERY_ID,PARAM_ORDER
DB
/jspeed/base/query/queryTemplateList.jsp
insert into jf_query_param (QUERY_ID,PARAM_ORDER,COLUMN_TYPE, CRE_USER,CRE_DATE,DSC_USER,DSC_DATE) values (?,?,?,?,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),?,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'))
update jf_query_param set COLUMN_TYPE=?, DSC_USER=?,DSC_DATE=TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') where QUERY_ID=? and PARAM_ORDER=?
select QUERY_ID||'.'||PARAM_ORDER key,QUERY_ID,PARAM_ORDER,COLUMN_TYPE, CRE_USER,CRE_DATE,DSC_USER,DSC_DATE from jf_query_param where QUERY_ID=? and PARAM_ORDER=?
jSpeedDataSource
delete from jf_query_param where QUERY_ID=?
select QUERY_ID||'.'||PARAM_ORDER key,QUERY_ID,PARAM_ORDER,COLUMN_TYPE, CRE_USER,CRE_DATE,DSC_USER,DSC_DATE from jf_query_param where QUERY_ID=? order by QUERY_ID,PARAM_ORDER
select * from ( select QUERY_ID||'.'||PARAM_ORDER key,QUERY_ID,PARAM_ORDER,COLUMN_TYPE, CRE_USER,CRE_DATE,DSC_USER,DSC_DATE,CEIL(rownum/?) page from jf_query_param) where page=?
